title: onCleanup
description: Registers a cleanup function on the current reactive owner. Runs when the owner is disposed or before an effect re-runs.
param_fn_desc: Cleanup function. Called when the owner disposes.
returns_desc: The same function passed in, for convenience.
usage_timer: The uptime monitor's <0>HttpCheck</0> starts a probe timer in <1>onMount</1> and registers <2>onCleanup</2> to clear it. When the check unmounts, the interval stops instead of firing against a disposed component.
usage_server: The page writer's <0>HttpChannel</0> opens an HTTP server inside its handler and returns <1>closeServer</1> as the teardown. That returned cleanup runs on dispose, calling <2>server.close()</2> to release the port before the process exits.
warning_no_owner: <0>onCleanup</0> called outside a <1>createRoot</1> or <2>render</2> will warn and the cleanup will never run.
in_the_wild: See these teardowns run when checks come and go in the <0>uptime-monitor walkthrough</0>.
